policy_note: Canonical source: schedule_config.json for targets/custom rules and trainer_profiles.json for availability/certifications. This file documents location guardrails only; trainer ownership is preference unless saved as a hard custom rule.

hard_constraints.description: Supreme weekly assignment count must never fall below 65
PowerCycle is a major Supreme pillar; schedule strong PowerCycle coverage without using low-performing histories
Supreme/Mumbai PowerCycle should prioritize Vivaran, Cauveri, and Karanvir when qualified and available
18:00/18:15/18:30/18:45 peak block should be prioritized with Tier 1 trainers where qualified and available
Strength Lab and Pre/Post Natal are not scheduled at Supreme
Do not schedule proven low-performing class/trainer/slot histories unless manually pinned
